label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, I need to analyze this question about causation and determine how a typical person would answer it. The question is asking whether the administrative assistant caused the problem of the receptionist having no pens left. Let me break down the scenario: 1. The receptionist keeps a desk stocked with pens. 2. Administrative assistants are allowed to take the pens. 3. Faculty members are supposed to buy their own pens. 4. Administrative assistants typically do take the pens. 5. Faculty members also take the pens (which is against the rules). 6. The receptionist emails reminders, but both groups still take the pens. 7. On Monday morning, an administrative assistant sees Professor Smith and both take pens. 8. Later that day, the receptionist needs to take a message but there
